assertions.assertion: Sets EncryptAssertions = true on the SamlServiceProvider
assertions.rationale: EncryptAssertions = true is set on the SamlServiceProvider.

assertions.assertion: Populates EncryptionCertificates with a certificate loaded from certs/sp-encryption.cer
Sets AllowIdpInitiated = true on the SamlServiceProvider
Mentions that the IdP-initiated SSO endpoint must be enabled via options.Endpoints.EnableSamlIdpInitiatedSsoEndpoint = true
Does NOT set EncryptAssertions = true without providing EncryptionCertificates
assertions.rationale: EncryptionCertificates is always provided alongside EncryptAssertions = true.
